title: Iwaki, Fukushima — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Iwaki, Fukushima: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Iwaki is a city in Fukushima with a population of 340,000. A coastal city in Fukushima with beautiful beaches, the scenic Jodogahama coast, and the famous Spa Resort Hawaiians.
